de.uka.ilkd.key.proof_references.analyst

Class MethodCallProofReferencesAnalyst

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof_references.analyst.MethodCallProofReferencesAnalyst
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    IProofReferencesAnalyst

    public class MethodCallProofReferencesAnalyst
extends Object
implements IProofReferencesAnalyst
    Extracts called methods.
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      MethodCallProofReferencesAnalyst() 

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      LinkedHashSet<IProofReference<?>> computeReferences(Node node, Services services)
      Computes the IProofReference for the given Node which can be null or an empty set if the applied rule is not supported by this IProofReferencesAnalyst.
      protected IProofReference<IProgramMethod> createReference(Node node, Services services, ExecutionContext context, MethodReference mr)
      Creates an IProofReference to the called IProgramMethod.
      protected ExecutionContext extractContext(Node node, Services services)
      Extracts the ExecutionContext.

    • Constructor Detail

      • MethodCallProofReferencesAnalyst

        public MethodCallProofReferencesAnalyst()

    • Method Detail

      • computeReferences

        public LinkedHashSet<IProofReference<?>> computeReferences(Node node,
                                                           Services services)
        Computes the IProofReference for the given Node which can be null or an empty set if the applied rule is not supported by this IProofReferencesAnalyst.
        Specified by:
        computeReferences in interface IProofReferencesAnalyst
        Parameters:
        node - The Node to compute its IProofReferences.
        services - The Services to use.
        Returns:
        The found IProofReference or null/empty set if the applied rule is not supported.

      • extractContext

        protected ExecutionContext extractContext(Node node,
                                          Services services)
        Extracts the ExecutionContext.
        Parameters:
        node - The Node to extract ExecutionContext from.
        services - The Services to use.
        Returns:
        The found ExecutionContext or null if not available.

      • createReference

        protected IProofReference<IProgramMethod> createReference(Node node,
                                                          Services services,
                                                          ExecutionContext context,
                                                          MethodReference mr)
        Creates an IProofReference to the called IProgramMethod.
        Parameters:
        node - The Node which caused the reference.
        services - The Services to use.
        context - The ExecutionContext to use.
        mr - The MethodReference.
        Returns:
        The created IProofReference.
